creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to void from comment #0)

The fact you can see the pkg-provides using 'pkg plugins' means the plugin
was properly installed and the library initialized at the begin of pkg.

The fact that 'pkg provides -u' returns the usage strings remember me something
I saw in this issue #267299 and fixed in latest version:

https://github.com/rosorio/pkg-provides/commit/2b0ed4f81b0c6c7ee6b53438401724fe4153630c

I don't have a arm64.aarch64 machine so maybe once fixed, 
I can send you a version to test ?
